subject: template matching crushes due to System.DivideByZeroException
body:
Hi all, 
need your help in figuring out the crush reason for WarpTools 
ts_template_match.
The inputs:
WarpTools ts_template_match \
--settings warp_tiltseries.settings \
--output_processing template_match \
--tomo_directory tiltseries/reconstruction \
--template_path templates/ref_gap_inv_21_box64_mode12.mrc \
--template_diameter 410 \
--peak_distance 100 \
--npeaks 2000 \
--subdivisions 3 \
--lowpass 0.7 \
--subvolume_size 64 

The reference and tomograms match in data mode (mode 12, 16-bit float), 
have correct pixel size in the header, and are both sue postie values to 
display density (white), the reference is reboxed to box 64. The run was 
attempted from a standard workflow 
<https://warpem.github.io/warp/user_guide/warptools/quick_start_warptools_tilt_series/>
.
Here is the error form the log file:
2025-03-04 08:32:59.176 Received "TomoMatch", with 3 arguments, for GPU #3, 
48392 MB free:
2025-03-04 08:32:59.317 Using 36864 orientations for matching
2025-03-04 08:32:59.319 0%
2025-03-04 08:32:59.343 Using 64 sub-volumes for matching, resulting in 
18473770 % overhead
2025-03-04 08:32:59.344 0%
2025-03-04 08:32:59.356 System.DivideByZeroException: Attempted to divide 
by zero.
2025-03-04 08:32:59.356    at Warp.Tools.int3.op_Division(int3 o1, Int32 
o2) in /mnt/d2/software/warp/WarpLib/Tools/IntVectors.cs:line 509
2025-03-04 08:32:59.356    at 
Warp.TiltSeries.MatchFull(ProcessingOptionsTomoFullMatch options, Image 
template, Func`4 progressCallback) in 
/mnt/d2/software/warp/WarpLib/TiltSeries.cs:line 2061
2025-03-04 08:32:59.356    at 
WarpWorker.WarpWorker.EvaluateCommand(NamedSerializableObject Command) in 
/mnt/d2/software/warp/WarpWorker/WarpWorker.cs:line 643

Thank you and best, 

Oleksiy
